name: Dark Contract with the Yamimakai
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>契</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>約</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>書</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Contract with the Dark Demon World
desc:
Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Take 1000 damage.
You can only use 1 of the following effects of "Dark Contract with the Yamimakai" per turn, and only once that turn.
● During your Main Phase: You can target 1 "D/D" Pendulum Monster in your Graveyard; place it in your Pendulum Zone.
● During your Main Phase: You can place 1 face-up "D/D" Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck in your Pendulum Zone.
eff:

● During your Main Phase: You can target 1 "D/D" Pendulum Monster in your Graveyard; place it in your Pendulum Zone.
● During your Main Phase: You can place 1 face-up "D/D" Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck in your Pendulum Zone.

action: Places from Graveyard to Pendulum Zone
Places from Extra Deck to Pendulum Zone
